title: secure container(security backpack)
description: just like in Escape From Tarkov, you can store important stuffs in the security case(secure container) without losing them after your sudden death
body:
just like Escape from Tarkov, you can now secure some of your valuable stuffs in the security case.
to make your security case larger, go to the server side and edit /config/securitybackpack-server.toml

Although the UI looks ugly, but it works well :)
